---
title: "CV"
---

## Professional Summary

Accounting and finance professional with over 15 years of experience in financial reporting, budgeting, and business operations.

Experienced in working within international environments, including a French pharmaceutical company and a German manufacturing firm. Strong background in supporting financial decision-making and improving business processes.

Currently expanding my skill set in data analytics to enhance financial planning and analysis (FP&A).

---

## Key Strengths

- Financial reporting and month-end / year-end closing
- Budgeting, forecasting, and cost analysis
- Cash flow management and financial control
- ERP systems: SAP, JD Edwards, D365
- Cross-functional collaboration with global headquarters
- Data analysis using Excel, Power Query, and Power BI

---

## Technical Skills

**Finance & Business Tools**
- SAP, JD Edwards, D365  
- Excel (Advanced), Power Query, Power BI  

**Data Analytics (Currently Developing)**
- Python (pandas, basic analysis)  
- SQL (basic querying)  
- R (RStudio)  
- GitHub  

---

## Download CV

For more detailed experience and background, please download my full CV below.

[Download my full CV (PDF)](CV2026.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}
